consts:
hnerv_repack_latent inflate: load our compact archive, run AaronLeslie138's HNeRV decoder.

Archive format (single 0.bin file):
  u32 dec_len   | dec_blob (brotli)   — concatenated INT8 codes (schema-driven)
  u32 sca_len   | sca_blob            — fp16 scales, one per tensor in schema order
  u32 lat_len   | lat_blob (brotli)   — per-dim asym uint8 + delta + lo/hi split
  u32 wrp_len   | wrp_blob (brotli)   — per-pair (u8 dim, i8 quant_delta), dim=255 means no-op

Credits: HNeRV decoder weights and architecture by AaronLeslie138 (PR #95 / hnerv_muon).
This submission re-packs his archive ~470 B smaller via schema-driven layer names + fp16 scales,
and adds a ~1.2 KB latent-correction sidecar (per-pair single-dim perturbation chosen to
minimize SegNet+PoseNet distortion).
doc:
hnerv_repack_latent inflate: load our compact archive, run AaronLeslie138's HNeRV decoder.

Archive format (single 0.bin file):
  u32 dec_len   | dec_blob (brotli)   — concatenated INT8 codes (schema-driven)
  u32 sca_len   | sca_blob            — fp16 scales, one per tensor in schema order
  u32 lat_len   | lat_blob (brotli)   — per-dim asym uint8 + delta + lo/hi split
  u32 wrp_len   | wrp_blob (brotli)   — per-pair (u8 dim, i8 quant_delta), dim=255 means no-op

Credits: HNeRV decoder weights and architecture by AaronLeslie138 (PR #95 / hnerv_muon).
This submission re-packs his archive ~470 B smaller via schema-driven layer names + fp16 scales,
and adds a ~1.2 KB latent-correction sidecar (per-pair single-dim perturbation chosen to
minimize SegNet+PoseNet distortion).

  4 to 10 -> 14 [0]
  14 to 110 -> 118 [1] lasti
  116 to 116 -> 118 [1] lasti

0           0 RESUME                   0

  1           2 LOAD_CONST               0 ("hnerv_repack_latent inflate: load our compact archive, run AaronLeslie138's HNeRV decoder.\n\nArchive format (single 0.bin file):\n  u32 dec_len   | dec_blob (brotli)   — concatenated INT8 codes (schema-driven)\n  u32 sca_len   | sca_blob            — fp16 scales, one per tensor in schema order\n  u32 lat_len   | lat_blob (brotli)   — per-dim asym uint8 + delta + lo/hi split\n  u32 wrp_len   | wrp_blob (brotli)   — per-pair (u8 dim, i8 quant_delta), dim=255 means no-op\n\nCredits: HNeRV decoder weights and architecture by AaronLeslie138 (PR #95 / hnerv_muon).\nThis submission re-packs his archive ~470 B smaller via schema-driven layer names + fp16 scales,\nand adds a ~1.2 KB latent-correction sidecar (per-pair single-dim perturbation chosen to\nminimize SegNet+PoseNet distortion).\n")
              4 STORE_NAME               0 (__doc__)
